research_list.name: University of Washington
research_list.reason: Strong reputation in STEM fields, including Computer Science and Mathematics. Notable for robust industry connections in its Computer Science program.

research_list.name: Stanford University
research_list.reason: Excellence in Computer Science with strong Silicon Valley connections. Offers robust undergraduate research opportunities and a strong focus on entrepreneurship.

research_list.name: University of California, Berkeley
research_list.reason: Top-ranked programs in Computer Science with vibrant entrepreneurship ecosystem. Offers substantial financial aid.

research_list.name: California Institute of Technology
research_list.reason: Renowned for cutting-edge research in STEM with a smaller campus environment and a highly favorable student-faculty ratio.

research_list.name: Oregon State University
research_list.reason: Strong STEM programs with supportive undergraduate research opportunities and a significant connection to local tech industries.
